plainTextBody:
MERLIN ENERGY INSIDER — Sunday, April 19, 2026

📊 **Business Performance:** In the last 24 hours, Merlin generated 85 TrueQuote™ analyses and captured 30 leads ($8,000 in revenue). Top performing vertical: data-center. Lead conversion rate: 35% vs 40% target. Wizard completion: 37% overall.

🔧 **System Health (43/100):** 🚨 CRITICAL: 🚨 CRITICAL: Frontend (merlinpro.energy) — OFFLINE — status: timeout Biggest wizard drop-off at Step 4 (19% leave here). Other items: 🚨 CRITICAL: Partner API (/v1/health) — API unhealthy — undefined

🌎 **Market Intelligence:** NREL ATB 2025 Preview: BESS Costs Projected to Fall Another 12% — NREL's upcoming Annual Technology Baseline suggests continued LFP cost declines driven by manufacturing scale. Rate increases in key markets continue to improve BESS ROI. Recommend updating utility rate data for Q2 2026.
